indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX categories_name_idx ON public.categories USING btree (name)
CREATE INDEX categories_organization_id_idx ON public.categories USING btree (organization_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX categories_pkey ON public.categories USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX categories_slug_idx ON public.categories USING btree (slug)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX categories_slug_key ON public.categories USING btree (organization_id, slug)

policies.policy_name: Users can delete categories from their organization
Users can insert categories for their organization
Users can update categories from their organization
Users can view categories from their organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX funnel_stages_pkey ON public.funnel_stages USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_funnel_stages_funnel ON public.funnel_stages USING btree (funnel_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_funnel_stages_order ON public.funnel_stages USING btree (funnel_id, order_index)

policies.policy_name: Admins can manage stages
Users can view stages of their organization funnels

indexes.index_definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX funnels_pkey ON public.funnels USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_funnels_org ON public.funnels USING btree (organization_id)

policies.policy_name: Admins can manage funnels
Users can view funnels of their organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_email ON public.invitations USING btree (email)
CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_organization_id ON public.invitations USING btree (organization_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_token ON public.invitations USING btree (token)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX invitations_pkey ON public.invitations USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX invitations_token_key ON public.invitations USING btree (token)

policies.policy_name: Admins can create invitations
Allow invitation acceptance
Enable delete for organization admins
Enable select for organization admins
Enable update for organization admins
Users can view org invitations

indexes.index_definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX lead_origins_name_org_unique ON public.lead_origins USING btree (organization_id, name)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX lead_origins_pkey ON public.lead_origins USING btree (id)

policies.policy_name: Users can delete origins for their organization
Users can insert origins for their organization
Users can update origins for their organization
Users can view origins from their organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX idx_lead_tags_lead ON public.lead_tags USING btree (lead_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_lead_tags_tag ON public.lead_tags USING btree (tag_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX lead_tags_pkey ON public.lead_tags USING btree (lead_id, tag_id)

policies.policy_name: Users can create lead tags for their organization
Users can delete lead tags from their organization
Users can view lead tags from their organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX idx_leads_assigned_to ON public.leads USING btree (assigned_to)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_card_order ON public.leads USING btree (stage_id, card_order)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_created_at ON public.leads USING btree (created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_email ON public.leads USING btree (email) WHERE (email IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_loss_reason ON public.leads USING btree (loss_reason_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_organization ON public.leads USING btree (organization_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_stage_id ON public.leads USING btree (stage_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_is_active ON public.leads USING btree (organization_id, is_active)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_status ON public.leads USING btree (status)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX leads_pkey ON public.leads USING btree (id)

policies.policy_name: Admins can delete leads
Users can create leads in their organization
Users can update leads in their organization
Users can view leads of their organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX idx_loss_reasons_org ON public.loss_reasons USING btree (organization_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX loss_reasons_pkey ON public.loss_reasons USING btree (id)

policies.policy_name: Users can create loss_reasons in their organization
Users can delete loss_reasons in their organization
Users can update loss_reasons in their organization
Users can view loss_reasons from their organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX idx_organizations_is_active ON public.organizations USING btree (is_active)
CREATE INDEX idx_organizations_slug ON public.organizations USING btree (slug)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX organizations_pkey ON public.organizations USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX organizations_slug_key ON public.organizations USING btree (slug)

policies.policy_name: Allow organization creation during signup
Only owners can update organization
Users can view own organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX idx_product_documents_product ON public.product_documents USING btree (product_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_product_documents_type ON public.product_documents USING btree (document_type)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX product_documents_pkey ON public.product_documents USING btree (id)

policies.policy_name: Users can delete product documents
Users can insert product documents
Users can update product documents
Users can view product documents from their organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX idx_product_images_position ON public.product_images USING btree (product_id, "position")
CREATE INDEX idx_product_images_primary ON public.product_images USING btree (product_id, is_primary) WHERE (is_primary = true)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX product_images_pkey ON public.product_images USING btree (id)

CREATE INDEX idx_products_created_at ON public.products USING btree (created_at DESC)

CREATE INDEX idx_products_status ON public.products USING btree (status)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_sku_per_org ON public.products USING btree (organization_id, sku)

Users can insert products in their organization

indexes.index_definition: CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_is_active ON public.profiles USING btree (is_active)
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_organization_id ON public.profiles USING btree (organization_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_role ON public.profiles USING btree (role)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX profiles_pkey ON public.profiles USING btree (id)

policies.policy_name: Admins can delete profiles
Admins can update organization profiles
Allow profile creation
